steps.title: Identify width and length
steps.content: The width is represented by $w$. The length is $46$ times the width, so the length is $46w$.

steps.title: Connect the area factors
steps.content:
Area is length times width. In
$$
y=(46w)(w)
$$
the factor $w$ is the width, which means the factor $46w$ is the length.

steps.title: Interpret the factor
steps.content: The expression $46w$ represents the length of the rectangle, in feet. The answer is A.
